name: diagGetTargetQualifier
title: diagGetTargetQualifier
syntax: long diagGetTargetQualifier( DWORD index, char bufferOut[], DWORD bufferSize);
description: Writes the target qualifier for the diagnostic target at given index into the buffer. If successful, the qualifier can be used in DiagSetTarget.

parameters.name: index
parameters.description: Value in 0 ≤ index ≤ n, where /n/ is the number of possible targets returned by DiagGetTargetCount.

parameters.name: bufferSize
parameters.description: Maximum number of characters available in the buffer.

return: Error code or number of characters copied into the buffer. Note that an error is returned if the buffer is too small for the qualifier.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
